article_title: Burnaby Council — 8.2. PDC- REZ 25-11 5053 Beresford Street 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to Consider Rezoning 5035 Beresford Street for 20-Storey Rental Tower
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a rezoning application that would allow a 215-unit, 20-storey rental apartment building at 5035 Beresford Street in Burnaby's Royal Oak area, replacing a current printing shop. The proposed bylaw would change the land's zoning from Special Industrial to a Comprehensive Development District to allow the residential tower.
briefs.action_required: Monitor Burnaby Council meeting agendas for the First and Second Reading vote date on this rezoning bylaw.

key_dates.label: Burnaby REZ #25-11 rezoning bylaw — First and Second Reading council meeting
